summary: Iteration 11: Agency Slug URLs Feature - 8/9 tests PASSED. Backend APIs fully working. Frontend has Unicode encoding issue displaying French accented characters as escape sequences (e.g., 'Véhicules' shows as 'V\u00e9hicules').

minor.issue: vehicle_count returns 15 but actual vehicles filtered by agency_id returns 11. Minor discrepancy in count.

ui_bugs.issue: French accented characters display as Unicode escape sequences (e.g., 'Véhicules' shows as 'V\u00e9hicules', 'Créer' as 'Cr\u00e9er'). This is a React Native Web/Metro bundling encoding issue.

test_1_agency_page_loads.details: Agency page /a/logirent-geneva loads correctly showing 'LogiRent Geneva', location 'Geneva, Switzerland', vehicle count 15, and phone number

test_2_agency_auth_section.details: 'Créer un compte' and 'Se connecter' buttons visible for non-logged users with data-testid attributes

test_3_agency_vehicle_count.details: Vehicles page shows 11 vehicles filtered by LogiRent Geneva agency_id (API filter works correctly)

test_4_backend_api_valid_slug.details: GET /api/public/agency/logirent-geneva returns agency data with slug field

test_6_register_with_agency_id.details: POST /api/auth/register with agency_id creates user bound to that agency with agency_name resolved

test_7_super_admin_agencies_page.details: Admin agencies page shows client links like '.../a/logirent-geneva' for each agency. Visible agencies: LogiRent Geneva, LogiRent Lausanne, TEST_Agency_b5c2b5

test_8_invalid_slug_error_page.details: Navigating to /a/invalid-slug shows 'Agence introuvable' error page with Retour button

test_9_french_accents.details: French accented characters display as Unicode escape sequences on /a/logirent-geneva page. Source code has proper UTF-8 but render shows \u00e9 instead of é

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: French accented characters showing as Unicode escape sequences (\u00e9 instead of é) in /app/frontend/app/a/[slug].tsx. This is a Metro/React Native Web bundling issue - check babel config or metro.config.js for charset handling
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend encoding issue: The source files have proper UTF-8 characters but the bundled output shows escape sequences. This affects user experience significantly as all French text is unreadable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agency slug feature mostly working. Backend API at /api/public/agency/{slug} returns agency info including vehicle_count. Registration with agency_id binds users to agencies. The critical issue is French UTF-8 characters displaying as escape sequences in the agency landing page - this needs Metro/Babel config investigation.
rca_of_the_issue: French Unicode encoding issue: Source files (app/a/[slug].tsx) contain proper UTF-8 characters (verified with od -c showing é as 303 251). However, React Native Web/Metro bundler is converting these to JavaScript Unicode escape sequences during build. Likely cause: Missing charset declaration or babel transform issue. Fix: Check babel.config.js exists and has proper UTF-8 handling, or add charset meta to web index.html.
